ip_policy.halo_master_chief_warthog: PROHIBITED — original armored soldier + original buggy ONLY

asset_strategy.current: procedural canvas-drawn sprites + Web Audio synth
asset_strategy.rationale: Direct web fetches to Kenney mirrors are blocked in this build environment. To ship a playable end-to-end game on the agreed overnight timeline, all sprites are drawn procedurally on the canvas at render time and all SFX are synthesized via the Web Audio API (matches the precedent set by Hardball Phase 0).
asset_strategy.kenney_upgrade_path: When network access is available, drop in: kenney.nl/assets/topdown-shooter-redux (CC0), kenney.nl/assets/tank-pack (CC0), and a Kenney audio pack. Map them to the categories below and swap renderers to drawImage(). Each procedural function is named after the slot it will replace.
